ground_truth.title: The Agency | ML (Machine Learning) at Georgia Tech
ground_truth.main_content:
The AI/Machine Learning Club at Georgia Tech

The Agency is Georgia Tech's student machine learning and artificial intelligence club. Founded in 2014 by passionate Georgia Tech students, the club has continued to grow. The club is a great resource for those interested in undergraduate research and looking to connect with others who are interested in machine learning. The Agency looks to enhance the student experience through collaborative research projects, partnering with other campus organizations, and hosting events like machine learning workshops and a graduate school interest dinner.

Learn More
